mapper.select: SELECT id, area_name AS areaName, available_spots AS availableSpots, occupied_spots AS occupiedSpots, hourly_rate AS hourlyRate, status FROM parking_area ORDER BY id
SELECT id, area_name AS areaName, available_spots AS availableSpots, occupied_spots AS occupiedSpots, hourly_rate AS hourlyRate, status FROM parking_area ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
